macro.what: 13.4% of home-sale agreements that went under contract in March were canceled
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.

macro.what: This was originally published by Inman on April 14, 2026
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: All Eyes on Fed Succession as Mortgage-Rate Swings Ease
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Mortgage-rate volatility has moderated as the United States and Iran near a peace agreement, but succession drama at the Federal Reserve may amp up uncertainty once again as Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh has his confirmation hearing
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Late April Is the Best Time to List a Home For Sale

macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.
